appraisal_events.evidence: D'une pudibonderie excessive, il cessa de venir pour ne pas rencontrer Swann qui avait fait ce qu'il appelait « un mariage déplacé, dans le goût du jour ».
appraisal_events.explanation: Vinteuil withholds social contact to avoid Swann, stigmatizing him for his marriage; the narrator signals distance by calling Vinteuil's prudery excessive.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, Swann is socially stigmatized and indirectly excluded due to his 'misplaced' marriage as judged by Vinteuil.
